title: New paper published in Nature Communications
content: Our latest research on rapid earthquake response using near-real-time InSAR has been accepted for publication in Nature Communications.

title: Group welcomes new PhD students
content: We are pleased to welcome three new PhD students who joined our research group this semester.

title: Professor Xu receives research award
content: Professor Xiaohua Xu has been awarded the Outstanding Researcher Award by the Chinese Geophysical Society.

title: Field work completed in Sichuan
content: Our team successfully completed two weeks of field work in Sichuan province for crustal deformation monitoring.
